use_cases: Animated number counter for displaying statistics or metrics on dashboards
Countdown timer for product launches or events
Progress indicator showing numeric values with smooth transitions
Real-time data visualization for analytics dashboards
Loading state with animated counter effect
ai_summary: A minimalist animated number counter component that smoothly counts from 0 to 100 over 5 seconds using Framer Motion. Displays the value in large mint-colored text with a clean, flat design. The component uses motion values and transforms for efficient animation, making it suitable for dashboards, launch pages, or anywhere a simple counting animation is needed.
